body_txt: A high, flared collar is a common item worn by characters with mystical powers (whether magic, ESP , or something else). This was long part of the look for people passing themselves off as mystics (along with turbans, head scarves, and crystal balls). Also, a high collar that fully concealed a wearer's head from behind was useful in certain stage-magic tricks that employ body-doubles. So this showed up in fiction for mystical characters. A Sister Trope to High Collar of Doom (and overlaps with mystical villains), Robe and Wizard Hat .
